info.title: Alfa LeetCode API
info.description: A comprehensive REST API for accessing LeetCode data including user profiles, problem sets, contest information, discussion forums, and submission statistics. This API provides endpoints to retrieve details about user profiles, badges, solved questions, contest details, contest history, submissions, calendar data, daily questions, selected problems, problem lists with filtering capabilities, trending discussions, and more.

tags.name: userDetails
tags.description: User profile, stats, submissions, badges, and account information

tags.name: contest
tags.description: Contest ranking, history, and performance data

tags.name: discussion
tags.description: Trending discussions, topics, and comments from the LeetCode community

tags.name: problems
tags.description: Problem lists, individual problems, daily challenges, and official solutions

tags.name: statistics
tags.description: User statistics including language stats and skill assessments

get.description: Returns a comprehensive list of available routes with descriptions, parameters, and usage examples for all endpoints in the API.

get.summary: Get official solution for a problem
get.description: Retrieves the official LeetCode solution for a specific problem including detailed explanations, code implementations, and complexity analysis.

get.summary: Get user submission calendar for a specific year
get.description: Retrieves detailed submission calendar data for a user including active years, streak information, total active days, badges earned, and submission history for the specified year.

get.summary: Get skill stats for a user
Get question progress for a user
Get comments for a discussion topic

get.description: Retrieves today's LeetCode daily challenge with formatted response including problem details, constraints, examples, hints, and solution information.

get.summary: Get a specific problem by slug
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific LeetCode problem including content, examples, constraints, hints, topic tags, and related problems.

get.summary: Get a list of problems with optional filtering
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of LeetCode problems with support for filtering by difficulty, topic tags, and pagination controls. This endpoint supports multiple query combinations creating various use cases.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of problems to return (default: 20, max: 100)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of problems to skip for pagination (default: 0)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Space-separated topic tags to filter problems (e.g., 'array math', 'dynamic-programming')

get.description: Convenience endpoint for retrieving only easy difficulty problems. This is equivalent to /problems?difficulty=EASY

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of problems to skip for pagination

get.description: Convenience endpoint for retrieving only medium difficulty problems. This is equivalent to /problems?difficulty=MEDIUM

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of problems to skip for pagination

get.description: Convenience endpoint for retrieving only hard difficulty problems. This is equivalent to /problems?difficulty=HARD

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of problems to skip for pagination

get.summary: Get language statistics for a user
get.description: Retrieves programming language usage statistics for a specific user, showing their submission distribution across different programming languages.
Retrieves detailed profile information for a LeetCode user including personal details, ranking, reputation, social links, location, and skill tags.
Retrieves all badges earned by a user including active badge, upcoming badges, and total badge count with detailed badge information.

get.summary: Get total number of solved problems

get.description: Retrieves aggregated submission calendar data for a user showing daily submission activity across all time. This provides a heat-map style view of user activity.

get.summary: Get problems by specific topic tag
get.description: Retrieves problems filtered by a specific topic tag. This is a convenience endpoint for topic-specific problem exploration.
Retrieves a list of popular LeetCode problems based on frequency and user engagement metrics.
Retrieves global platform statistics including total problems, users, submission counts, and platform-wide metrics.
Search for problems using keywords in title or content. Supports fuzzy matching and relevance-based sorting.

questionLink.description: Direct link to the problem on LeetCode

questionFrontendId.description: Frontend question number visible to users

isPaidOnly.description: Whether the problem requires premium subscription

totalQuestions.description: Total number of problems matching the criteria

count.description: Number of problems returned in this response

isFavor.description: Whether problem is marked as favorite

status.description: User's solving status for this problem

submissionCalendar.description: JSON string containing calendar submission data

problemsSolved.description: Number of problems solved in this language

totalProblems.description: Total number of problems on the platform
